case_title: ETCHEVERRY, PIERRE VS WILEY, STEPHANIE L.

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY ETCHEVERRY, PIERRE AS TO DEFENDANT WILEY, STEPHANIE L. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-19-2007 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE $0.00). SERVED DEC-02-2007, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT WILEY, STEPHANIE L.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT WILEY, STEPHANIE L.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED FEB-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ETCHEVERRY, PIERRE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WILEY, STEPHANIE L. $1,270.58 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,300.58, THE COURT DETERMINES PLAINTIFF'S DAMAGES TO BE $1411.75, AND ATTRIBUTES 10% COMPARITIVE FAULT TO PLAINTIFF. THE JUDGMENT IS A NET AWARD FOR DAMAGES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-19-2007 - JUDGMENT.
